apify_company_profile_items.description: 2150 is a venture capital firm investing in technology companies that are redefining cities and the industries that sustain them. Built on the belief that cities drive the majority of global prosperity and represent the greatest opportunity for sustainable progress, 2150 backs founders developing transformative solutions across energy, industrial decarbonisation, advanced manufacturing, mobility solutions, and urban systems. 2150 manages €500 million in assets under management and invests worldwide from its offices in London, Copenhagen and Berlin.

update_data.content:
J.P. Morganrecently published it's Climate Technology report in which it highlights the acceleating investment momentum into "Grid Tech", next-generation battery technologies, solutions for adaptation and resilience and critical mineral startups. In another recent report, the bank frames the need to scale these solutions as a "shift to treat climate impacts as [national] security threats." 

We are seeing the same momentum across our portfolio fromNodes & Linksapplying it's AI platform to help deliver energy projects toSiTration, Inc.andMETYCLEaccelerating access to critical minerals toBlue Frontier, Inc.andNatureMetricssupporting adaptation and resilience.

Climate Tech Industry Trends:https://lnkd.in/geDS6DSBClimate Change and National Security:https://lnkd.in/gs32Z3wq#ClimateTech#CriticalMinerals#Adaptation#JPMorgan#VentureCapital#Resilience

Why we are excited to have co-ledCocoon's $15m funding round:

The world is racing to build compute, manufacturing, energy, and other essential infrastructure. But a key ingredient to that build out is running out. 

Supplementary cementitious materials (SCMs) are essential to how concrete is made today, but our conventional sources are disappearing. 

Cocoon is tackling this shortage by unlocking new supply streams, helping the world to keep building at lower cost and lower carbon. They are moving at pace, moving from lab to real world deployment in just 18 months, and on track to break ground this year of their first commercial demonstration facility.

We’re excited to partner with them on the road ahead! 🚀https://lnkd.in/eP8BZjYH#VentureCapital#ClimateTech#SustainableCement#SustainableCities

Congratulations to our portfolio companiesLuxWall, Inc.andAtmosZerofor being selected for theFast CompanyMost Innovative Companies list of 2026!

Read more here:https://lnkd.in/epWsKKNaOn AtmosZero:  "It’s set a record for the most powerful air-source heat pump capable of making steam directly, and uses the startup’s proprietary compressors to efficiently make steam as hot at 200 degrees Celsius (392 degrees Fahrenheit)."

On Luxwall: "As utilities work to meet growing energy demand, an unexpected tool can help ease pressure on the power grid: windows that insulate like walls."

update_data.content:
🚨 Cocoon raises $15m co-led by2150to help the world keep building, at lower cost and lower carbon. 🚨

Concrete is the foundation of the built world. The second most consumed material on earth, we pour 30 billion tonnes of it every year, into the factories, data centers, hospitals, and infrastructure that define modern civilization. And for decades, supplementary cementitious materials (SCMs) have made that concrete cheaper and cleaner but also stronger and more durable.
Now, the supply of SCMs is running out.CocoonCarbon is here to change that. By upcycling underutilized industrial byproducts into a low cost, low carbon, scalable SCM, Cocoon is unlocking an entirely new stream to solve the material constraints in the construction industry.

We’re excited to supportEliot,Freddie,William, and the broader Cocoon team in this mission, alongsideBrick & Mortar Ventures,The Venture Collective (TVC), and existing investorsWireframe Ventures,Celsius Industries,Gigascale CapitalandSOSV. 

The world needs to keep building. Cocoon makes sure it can.Axiosexclusive in the comments:#ClimateTech#SustainableCities#VentureCapital#FundingRound

update_data.content:
This International Women’s Day 2026, we’re celebrating the incredible leaders across the2150ecosystem.

Chair, CEO, CFO, Founder, Chief Commercial Officer, Chief Technology Officer, Investor - their leadership, expertise, and vision are shaping our common future.

We’re proud to work alongside these women who are solving some of the hardest problems in climate, infrastructure, industry and urban resilience.

Thank you for the leadership, creativity, and determination you bring every day.Dimple Patel, CEO,NatureMetricsCamila Freitas Ribeiro, Director of Product
Kristal Kaye, CFO and Interim CEO,CarbonCure TechnologiesNara Cury, CFO,VammoBarbara Wittenberg, CTO,1KOMMA5°Carmela Borrotzu-Evans (ACMA, CGMA), CFO,Normative.ioSarah Flannigan, Chair,Normative.ioChrystin Matuszek, Chief Commercial Officer,Ampd EnergySarah Melvin, VP Strategy & Operations,SiTration, Inc.Maddalena Andriolo, Finance Director,Nodes & LinksPatricia Wexler, Venture Partner,2150Nicole Florack, Investor,2150Gemma Shepherd, Investor,2150Amber Chow, Partnerships & Sustainability,2150...and the female co-founders and leaders of investments we have yet to announce!#InternationalWomensDay#WomenInVC#WomenInClimate#IWD2026

update_data.content:
Our UNSUSTAINABLE series continues, this time with a focus on our growing demand for copper to power our path towards electrification and the growth of data centers. Demand for copper is expected to increase 50% by 2040 and it is already playing a growing role in geopolitics. 

Digging a new mine is not only unsustainable, it also requires an average of 17 years, but solutions and technologies like those fromSiTration, Inc.andMETYCLEcan help satisfy our growing need for this critical mineral with resources that are already above ground. 

Read more about our accelerating thirst for copper here:https://lnkd.in/ewbiPbQK

An evening hosting fellow Climate investors, entrepreneurs and friends for a very special screening of David Attenborough’s Ocean. With very special thanks toRevive Our Oceanand movie executive producersEnric SalaandKristin Rechbergerfor allowing us to learn about the challenges and the opportunities our oceans provide. 5 ⭐Review!

Learn more athttps://lnkd.in/g8Qx5q8i#Attenborough#Ocean#ReviveOurOcean#30by30

update_data.content:
Some further reflections on the announcement of our Fund II and the €500m of AUM milestone below along with some great news coverage and podcasts:

📝  Bloghttps://lnkd.in/eB7rkKhw📰 NewsTechCrunchhttps://lnkd.in/g5uSTX_UESG Todayhttps://lnkd.in/d6qf6GadTech.euhttps://lnkd.in/e6rZSmz6New Private Marketshttps://lnkd.in/eMN8jqUr🎙️ PodcastsEUVCwith our LPJan Hofmannhttps://lnkd.in/ekSjptDzHugo Rauchof New Wave withJacob Brohttps://lnkd.in/esYWbgWdSeb Johnson 📊🇪🇺of Scaling Europe with Jacobhttps://lnkd.in/em9bMgUuMike Butcher ✍️ofPathfounderswithChristian Hernandez Gallardohttps://lnkd.in/eMjTACpH#VentureCapital#ClimateTech#Fundraising#VC#SustainableCities

2150is celebrating the final close of our second fund allowing us to reach €500m in assets under management in just short four years since we unveiled. 

Fund II has already invested in seven companies includingMission Zero TechnologiesMETYCLEAtmosZeroGetmobiland three more due to be announced in due course. 

The success of 2150 is defined by the founders that we back, by the Limited Partners that have been willing to support us, and by the amazing passionate team that has joined us.

Here is to celebrating the last 4 years of our voyage and here is to celebrating what might yet come in the next 20!#VentureCapital#ClimateTech#SustainableTechnologies#EnergyResilience#VC#StartupsJacob BroChristian Hernandez GallardoChristian JølckRahul ParekhMikkel Bülow-LehnsbyPeter HirschGemma ShepherdAmber ChowDerek BrooksNicole FlorackMax BlanshardGustavo ChungAlexander KiellandChristian Højdevang

update_data.content:
Along with our friends at Undaunted at theGrantham Institute - Climate Change and the Environmentwe are launching a series of dialogues bringing together academia, innovators, policy makers and industry.

Join us for the first session on "Rebuilding Concrete and Cement" on Tuesday February 12th atImperial College London. 

Register here:https://lnkd.in/eVEBiHMp#ClimateTech#SustainableCement#ImperialCollege

lead_before_enrichment.description: # Constructive Capital for Urban Tech [![2150.vc](https://2150.vc/wp-content/themes/2150Theme/public/images/logo-dark.svg)](https://2150.vc/ "Homepage") We are Taking on the biggest sustainability challenge on the planet [See more](https://2150.vc/#see-more) Who we are ## We back tech entrepreneurs who are reimagining and innovating the Urban Stack Building businesses that are changing how our cities are designed, constructed and powered, for good.

Built on the belief that cities drive the majority of global prosperity and represent the greatest opportunity for sustainable progress, 2150 backs founders developing transformative solutions across energy, industrial decarbonisation, advanced manufacturing, mobility solutions, and urban systems. 2150 manages €500 million in assets under management and invests worldwide from its offices in London, Copenhagen and Berlin.
